description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with five evenly spaced horizontal shelves, supported by a sturdy frame. The shelves are a rich, dark brown color, likely made of wood or a wood composite, while the side panels appear to be a lighter, textured material, possibly metal or laminate. The structure is open on the front and back, allowing easy access to items placed on the shelves from either side. The corners are reinforced with visible metal brackets, adding both stability and a subtle industrial aesthetic. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban public spaces for storage or display. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its utilitarian purpose.
description: A tall, open shelving unit with five dark brown shelves and a light, textured frame, reinforced by metal brackets. Its minimal, functional design is ideal for storage or display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five shelves and the open, accessible design with visible metal brackets at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the frame, with the shelves appearing as horizontal lines.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the open back and the same shelf arrangement, with no backing panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the frame's construction and shelf depth.
